name: uncver-knowledge-graph
description: Knowledge graph interface for mercury-inception AI. Stores facts (Subject-Predicate-Object) using uncver-kg and provides query interface.
author: uncver
features: Answers knowledge queries from mercury-inception AI
Listens for knowledge write requests via Redis
Provides query interface for AI context retrieval
Maintains conversation context and learned facts

write_fact.description: Store a fact that David works on Rust
commands: redis-cli XADD uncver:stream:knowledge '*' type write_fact subject David predicate WORKS_ON object Rust
redis-cli XADD uncver:stream:queries '*' type query_subject subject David
redis-cli XADD uncver:stream:queries '*' type query_knowledge query Rust

get_context.description: Mercury-inception AI gets context before responding
commands: redis-cli XADD uncver:stream:queries '*' type get_context_for_topic topic Rust

learn_from_conversation.description: Store fact that user shared they like Rust
commands: redis-cli XADD uncver:stream:knowledge '*' type learn_from_conversation topic User fact 'likes Rust' source user_shared
